ogTitle: Sarina vs Sarina Beach: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Sarina and Sarina Beach.
heading: Sarina vs Sarina Beach — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Sarina, Queensland and Sarina Beach, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Sarina Beach has a lower overall climate risk score (28/100) compared to Sarina (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Sarina or Sarina Beach safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Sarina has a flood risk score of 35/100, while Sarina Beach scores 22/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Sarina scores 65/100 for bushfire risk. Sarina Beach scores 36/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Sarina or Sarina Beach?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Sarina Beach has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.53% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
